ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  CARE Ratings Limited has announced the rescheduling of its Analyst/Institutional Investor Meeting from June 25th to June 29th, 2026, citing "some exigencies" as the reason. This appears to be a logistical change with minimal material impact, as the company explicitly states discussions will be based solely on publicly available information and no unpublished price sensitive information (UPSI) will be disclosed. While the repeated mention of "exigencies" is a minor red flag due to its vagueness, the clear statement about no UPSI mitigates concerns about hidden adverse information.
